Emit-phase group/root rules: groups own only non-executable nodes, carry
flags only, and inherited names stay unique across the chain.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli v0.1.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli => CLIDIR
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- shared/shared.go --
package shared

import "github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli"

//fabrik:cli:group name=witharg
//fabrik:cli:argument name=target type=string default=x
var _witharg struct{}

//fabrik:cli:group name=migrate
var _migrate struct{}

//fabrik:cli:command
func Migrate(ctx cli.Context) error { return nil }

//fabrik:cli:group name=database
//fabrik:cli:flag name=timeout type=int default=30
var _database struct{}

//fabrik:cli:command path="database migrate"
//fabrik:cli:flag name=timeout type=int default=10
func DBMigrate(ctx cli.Context, timeout int) error { return nil }

//fabrik:cli:root version=1.0.0
//fabrik:cli:flag name=verbose type=bool short=v
//fabrik:cli:flag name=version type=bool
var _root struct{}

//fabrik:cli:group name=tools
//fabrik:cli:flag name=verbose type=bool
var _tools struct{}

//fabrik:cli:group name=exports
//fabrik:cli:flag name=fast type=bool short=f
//fabrik:cli:flag name=force type=bool short=f
var _exports struct{}

//fabrik:cli:command path="late run"
//fabrik:cli:flag name=local type=bool
func LateRun(ctx cli.Context, local bool, mode string) error { return nil }

//fabrik:cli:group name=late
//fabrik:cli:flag name=mode type=string default=fast
//fabrik:cli:argument name=bad type=string default=x
var _late struct{}

//fabrik:cli:command path="database status"
//fabrik:cli:flag name=vertical type=bool short=v
func DBStatus(ctx cli.Context, vertical bool) error { return nil }
-- want/diags --
error: shared/shared.go:6:1: //fabrik:cli:argument belongs to a command function
  help: groups and the root declare flags only
error: shared/shared.go:9:1: //fabrik:cli:group "migrate" names an executable command's path
  help: the command owns this node; groups describe non-executable nodes
error: shared/shared.go:20:1: flag "timeout" collides with the inherited flag declared at $WORK/shared/shared.go:16:1
  help: inherited long names are unique across the ancestor chain
error: shared/shared.go:25:1: root flag "version" collides with the --version flag version= reserves
  help: the cli library rejects this tree at startup
error: shared/shared.go:29:1: flag "verbose" collides with the inherited flag declared at $WORK/shared/shared.go:24:1
  help: inherited long names are unique across the ancestor chain
error: shared/shared.go:34:1: flags "fast" and "force" share short -f on group exports
  help: the cli library rejects duplicate shorts at startup
error: shared/shared.go:43:1: //fabrik:cli:argument belongs to a command function
  help: groups and the root declare flags only
error: shared/shared.go:47:1: flags "verbose" and "vertical" share short -v on one chain
  help: the cli library rejects duplicate shorts at startup
